caption: The video captures a scene outside the Real Madrid training facility, Ciudad Real Madrid, on a sunny Monday morning at 10:07. A white bus with "Real Madrid" written on its front is parked in front of the building, which prominently displays the club's logo and name. The bus door is open, suggesting that players or staff might be boarding or disembarking. The setting is well-maintained, with clean pavement and neatly trimmed greenery, reflecting the professional environment of the club. The timestamp and location text overlay indicates the specific date and time, adding context to the footage.
